subcodes.title: Words to Breakwell, Hopper, Brittingham, spoken around 1901-09-04
subcodes.first_line: This 'letter' means a person. As the Word came forth from the mouth... 'The seas moved' - the seas of existence; the seas of life
subcodes.subjects: @symbolism, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual transformation, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @procession; appearance of the Word from God
